title: breynia formosana
intro: Breynia formosana, also known as the Nine-bark or Tai Shan stone tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a small evergreen shrub native to Taiwan and southern China, known for its unique, multicolored bark that sheds in sheets. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Breynia formosana is often used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and can be prepared as a tea, powder, or tincture for its health benefits.
